name: rss-saas
description: RSS SaaS - AI-powered RSS feed reader with team collaboration

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev:server" "wait-on http://localhost:3001/health && npm run dev:client"
scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd apps/server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.db:migrate: cd apps/server && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.lint: npm run lint:server && npm run lint:client

author: rivsy Team
